creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
(In reply to Ronald Klop from comment #2)

Hi Ronald,
thank you for your idea but if i add "MAVEN_OPTS="-Xss64m -Xmx2g -XX:ReservedCodeCacheSize=1g"" parameter there is a problem with "java.lang.OutOfMemoryError : unable to create new native Thread" and if is
only MAVEN_OPTS="-Xmx2g -XX:ReservedCodeCacheSize=1g" is OutOfMemoryError.
I have a default installation i386 VirtualBox VM with 4096Mb memory and 3 Processors
